title: Credential Manager: Suspicious Credential Read Activity
description: Detects Event 5379 credential manager read operations at high frequency — indicates credential harvesting tools (lazagne, seatbelt, mimikatz vault::cred) systematically dumping stored credentials.
query: 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' and 'Event ID' = '5379' | eval Account = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'SubjectUserName:([^;]+)') | stats count as Reads by Account, Entity | where Reads > 20 | sort -Reads
falsepositives: Users with many saved credentials being re-authenticated
